summary: Ukrainian drone operators from the 1st "Azov" corps are targeting Russian logistics near Donetsk, including routes around Zuhres, Andriivka, Starobesheve, Horlivka, Lysychansk, and the Donetsk Ring Road, highlighting gaps in Russian air defenses. On April 16, the SBS Birds conducted a coordinated strike hitting three air defense systems, two Iskander bases, the Rubicon base, two oil depots, and other logistics and support facilities, totaling 16 military targets. The Rubicon Center reported destroying 105 targets on April 16 and 107 on April 15, including Ukrainian personnel, fixed-wing UAVs, and UAV launch points, with operations spanning Donbas, Sumy, Belgorod, and Krasny Liman. Ukrainian forces used FPV drones to kill Russian soldiers attempting assaults on motorcycles and to eliminate a soldier who feigned surrender before fleeing toward comrades. In the Kostiantynivka direction, the 36th Marine Brigade survived a Russian FPV drone attack, with a drone detector alerting them at 0:11 in footage showing the Russian perspective. Ukrainian electronic warfare was also demonstrated when an operator gave an FPV drone 15 seconds to land.
